title: Excel file format support is now available by default ​
body:
**July 7, 2026**

Excel file format support is now available by default for all workspaces. You can ingest, parse, and query `.xls`, `.xlsx`, and `.xlsm` files directly using built-in support, without external libraries or manual conversions. See [Read and stream Excel files](/aws/en/query/formats/excel).
